diff all

# version
# INAV/SPEEDYBEEF405WING 9.0.1 Apr 28 2026 / 18:03:52 (ed3f5c1e) 
# GCC-13.2.1 20231009

# start the command batch
batch start

# reset configuration to default settings
defaults noreboot

# resources

# Timer overrides

# Outputs [servo]
servo 1 1100 1900 1500 -100
servo 2 1100 1900 1500 100
servo 3 1000 2000 1000 100

# safehome
safehome 0 1 481234567 59876543
safehome 1 1 471234567 58876543
safehome 2 1 461234567 57876543
safehome 3 1 451234567 56876543

# Fixed Wing Approach
fwapproach 0 6000 500 0 -55 0 0
fwapproach 1 6000 500 0 -255 -345 0
fwapproach 2 8000 500 0 -215 -35 0
fwapproach 3 6000 500 1 -350 -170 0
fwapproach 8 6000 500 0 0 0 0

# geozone
geozone 0 0 0 -100000 0 0 1 2


# geozone vertices
geozone vertex 0 0 481234567 59876543
geozone vertex 0 1 200000 0


# features
feature BAT_PROF_AUTOSWITCH
feature GEOZONE
feature GPS
feature LED_STRIP
feature PWM_OUTPUT_ENABLE
feature FW_LAUNCH
feature FW_AUTOTRIM

# beeper

# blackbox

blackbox MAG
blackbox ACC
blackbox ATTI

blackbox RC_COMMAND

blackbox SERVOS

# Programming: PID controllers

# OSD: custom elements

# master
set looptime = 1000
set gyro_anti_aliasing_lpf_hz = 0
set gyro_main_lpf_hz = 25
set dynamic_gyro_notch_q = 250
set dynamic_gyro_notch_min_hz = 30
set setpoint_kalman_enabled = OFF
set gyro_zero_x = -6
set gyro_zero_y = -6
set gyro_zero_z = 3
set ins_gravity_cmss =  986.515
set gyro_adaptive_filter_min_hz = 20
set acc_hardware = ICM42605
set acczero_x = -2
set acczero_y = -5
set acczero_z = 42
set accgain_x = 4090
set accgain_y = 4090
set accgain_z = 4102
set align_mag = CW180FLIP
set mag_hardware = NONE
set magzero_x = 83
set magzero_y = -944
set magzero_z = 264
set maggain_x = 1439
set maggain_y = 1437
set maggain_z = 1503
set baro_hardware = SPL06
set pitot_hardware = VIRTUAL
set blackbox_rate_denom = 4
set motor_pwm_protocol = STANDARD
set failsafe_delay = 3
set failsafe_procedure = RTH
set battery_capacity_unit = MWH
set current_meter_scale = 190
set current_meter_offset = 175
set cruise_power = 22200
set idle_power = 700
set servo_pwm_rate = 330
set small_angle = 180
set applied_defaults = 4
set rpm_gyro_filter_enabled = ON
set rpm_gyro_min_hz = 90
set gps_sbas_mode = AUTO
set gps_ublox_use_glonass = ON
set airmode_type = STICK_CENTER_ONCE
set nav_wp_radius = 1000
set nav_wp_max_safe_distance = 500
set nav_overrides_motor_stop = AUTO_ONLY
set nav_fw_soaring_motor_stop = ON
set nav_rth_climb_first_stage_mode = EXTRA
set nav_rth_climb_first_stage_altitude = 3000
set nav_rth_allow_landing = FS_ONLY
set nav_rth_altitude = 5000
set nav_rth_home_altitude = 7500
set nav_rth_linear_descent_start_distance = 1500
set nav_rth_use_linear_descent = ON
set safehome_usage_mode = RTH_FS
set nav_fw_bank_angle = 45
set nav_fw_climb_angle = 30
set fw_min_throttle_down_pitch = 50
set fw_loiter_direction = YAW
set nav_fw_cruise_speed = 2083
set nav_fw_control_smoothness = 2
set nav_fw_launch_max_angle = 75
set nav_fw_launch_motor_delay = 250
set nav_fw_launch_spinup_time = 1000
set nav_fw_launch_min_time = 250
set nav_fw_launch_timeout = 6000
set nav_fw_launch_max_altitude = 8000
set nav_fw_launch_climb_angle = 22
set nav_fw_allow_manual_thr_increase = ON
set mavlink_version = 1
set osd_video_system = DJI_NATIVE
set osd_stats_energy_unit = WH
set osd_time_alarm = 0
set osd_alt_alarm = 0
set osd_dist_alarm = 0
set osd_neg_alt_alarm = 0
set osd_crosshairs_style = TYPE8
set osd_camera_uptilt = -5
set osd_hud_radar_disp = 3
set osd_hud_radar_range_min = 10
set osd_hud_wp_disp = 3
set osd_plus_code_digits = 10
set osd_plus_code_short = 4
set i2c_speed = 800KHZ
set stats = ON
set stats_total_time = 42907
set stats_total_dist = 782245
set stats_total_energy = 1155043
set stats_flight_count = 2
set tz_automatic_dst = EU
set nav_fw_land_glide_pitch = 5
set nav_fw_land_max_tailwind = 417

# control_profile
control_profile 1

set fw_p_pitch = 20
set fw_d_pitch = 9
set fw_ff_pitch = 87
set fw_p_roll = 20
set fw_i_roll = 4
set fw_d_roll = 10
set fw_ff_roll = 72
set fw_p_yaw = 20
set fw_i_yaw = 0
set fw_ff_yaw = 100
set max_angle_inclination_rll = 550
set dterm_lpf_hz = 10
set fw_turn_assist_pitch_gain =  0.300
set nav_fw_pos_z_p = 25
set nav_fw_pos_z_i = 6
set nav_fw_pos_z_d = 5
set nav_fw_alt_control_response = 45
set d_boost_min =  1.000
set d_boost_max =  1.000
set fw_level_pitch_trim =  1.990
set thr_mid = 0
set tpa_rate = 80
set tpa_pitch_compensation = 12
set rc_expo = 30
set rc_yaw_expo = 30
set pitch_rate = 11
set yaw_rate = 4
set manual_rc_expo = 45

# control_profile
control_profile 2

set fw_p_pitch = 15
set fw_i_pitch = 5
set fw_d_pitch = 5
set fw_ff_pitch = 70
set fw_p_roll = 15
set fw_i_roll = 3
set fw_d_roll = 7
set fw_p_yaw = 20
set fw_i_yaw = 0
set fw_ff_yaw = 100
set max_angle_inclination_rll = 550

set fw_turn_assist_pitch_gain =  0.300

set nav_fw_pos_z_i = 6
set nav_fw_pos_z_d = 5

set d_boost_max =  1.000
set tpa_rate = 80
set rc_expo = 30
set rc_yaw_expo = 30
set roll_rate = 18
set pitch_rate = 9
set yaw_rate = 3

# control_profile
control_profile 3

set fw_p_pitch = 15
set fw_i_pitch = 5
set fw_d_pitch = 5
set fw_ff_pitch = 70
set fw_p_roll = 15
set fw_i_roll = 3
set fw_d_roll = 7
set fw_p_yaw = 20
set fw_i_yaw = 0
set fw_ff_yaw = 100
set max_angle_inclination_rll = 550
set dterm_lpf_hz = 10
set fw_turn_assist_pitch_gain =  0.300
set nav_fw_pos_z_p = 25
set nav_fw_pos_z_i = 6
set nav_fw_pos_z_d = 5
set d_boost_min =  1.000
set d_boost_max =  1.000
set tpa_rate = 80
set rc_expo = 30
set rc_yaw_expo = 30
set roll_rate = 18
set pitch_rate = 9
set yaw_rate = 3

# mixer_profile
mixer_profile 1

set platform_type = AIRPLANE
set model_preview_type = 8

# Mixer: motor mixer

mmix reset

mmix 0  1.000  0.000  0.000  0.000

# Mixer: servo mixer
smix reset

smix 0 1 0 55 0 -1
smix 1 1 1 45 0 -1
smix 2 2 0 -55 0 -1
smix 3 2 1 45 0 -1
smix 4 3 29 100 0 3

# mixer_profile
mixer_profile 2


# Mixer: motor mixer

# Mixer: servo mixer

# battery_profile
battery_profile 1

set vbat_min_cell_voltage = 280
set vbat_warning_cell_voltage = 330
set battery_capacity = 64800
set throttle_idle =  5.000
set nav_fw_cruise_thr = 1300
set nav_fw_pitch2thr = 8
set nav_fw_launch_thr = 1900
set nav_fw_launch_idle_thr = 1600

# battery_profile
battery_profile 2

set battery_capacity = 29600
set throttle_idle =  5.000
set nav_fw_cruise_thr = 1300
set nav_fw_pitch2thr = 8
set nav_fw_launch_thr = 1800
set nav_fw_launch_idle_thr = 1100

# battery_profile
battery_profile 3

set throttle_idle =  5.000

# restore original profile selection
control_profile 1
mixer_profile 1
battery_profile 2

# save configuration
save

#
